raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a charge of {$240.00} from XXXX dated XX/XX/2026. The merchant instructed me to return the item, which I did. The return was shipped and successfully delivered on XX/XX/2026 and signed by XXXX, and I have proof of delivery. 

I provided this documentation to Citibank during the dispute process. I was initially informed that my case would be reopened and resolved within XXXX business days. However, after following up, I was told the timeframe had passed and the dispute would not be reconsidered. 

Despite returning the item and providing proof, I did not receive a refund. I am requesting that the dispute be reopened and the charge be credited based on the confirmed return and delivery.
